Jason Sissel — WellnessFX: Your Health in a Drop of Blood
Ultraman Canada — official 2009 final results (readable mirror)
Ultraman World Championships — official 2010 overall results (readable mirror)
Endurance News — 2010 Ultraman World Championships event dates

TranscriptionNotes: Jason Sissel's own publication page identifies the linked PDF as his full WellnessFX blood results; the report names him and labels every value used here with one Last Test Date, 18 November 2014.

AgeYears is 38. The official 31 July–3 August 2009 Ultraman Canada result reports age 33, while the official 26–28 November 2010 Ultraman World Championship result reports M34. Their possible birth-date intervals overlap only from 29 November 1975 through 3 August 1976, throughout which he was 38 on the blood draw date.

The 2009 and 2010 official results are linked through read-only HTTPS mirrors because the origin sites block or no longer negotiate a usable automated connection; each origin URL remains explicit in its mirror path.
Albumin was converted from g/dL to g/L by multiplying by 10.
Creatinine was converted from mg/dL to µmol/L by multiplying by 88.4.
Glucose was converted from mg/dL to mmol/L by multiplying by 0.0555.
